items.notes: RESON's core product line is multibeam sonar systems used as survey/imaging payloads on AUVs, ROVs, and USVs.

evidence.snippet:
### [Hydrophones & Transducers](/products/product-line/hydrophones-and-transducers)
Teledyne Marine manufactures a broad range of hydrophones. From oceanographic research to monitoring industrial processes, we have a range of hydrophones for reference measurement, reference projectors, passive arrays, positioning systems and tracking systems.

items.notes: Hydrophones and transducers form a secondary product line used for tracking, positioning, and reference measurement in underwater systems.

evidence.snippet: Headquartered in Denmark, Teledyne RESON has offices in the USA, the UK, the Netherlands, Germany and Shanghai. And you'll find Teledyne RESON representatives ready to help you around the world. ​

*   Teledyne Benthos Sub bottom profiler (SBP)
*   Teledyne RESON Multi-Beam Echo Sounder (MBES)

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: RESON makes multibeam sonar sensors and hydrophones/transducers that are integrated into AUVs, ROVs, and USVs as payload components. They have a dedicated 'ROV, AUV & USV Sonars' product line.

items.name: ROV, AUV & USV Sonars
items.product_type: multibeam sonar product line for unmanned vehicles

### [Hydrophones & Transducers](/products/product-line/hydrophones-and-transducers)
Teledyne Marine manufactures a broad range of hydrophones. From oceanographic research to monitoring industrial processes, we have a range of hydrophones for reference measurement, reference projectors, passive arrays, positioning systems and tracking systems.

products.notes: Named SKU-level product names (e.g. SeaBat series) not present in fetched corpus pages; product lines and categories are listed.

blue_uas.notes: RESON makes underwater sonar equipment for AUVs/ROVs/USVs, not aerial sUAS. Blue UAS list is not applicable.

evidence.snippet:
Teledyne RESON A/S has been an ISO 9001 registered company since March 2004, and before that AQAP-120 certified since March 1995, and assessed by Air Material Command – Royal Danish Air Force.
Teledyne RESON maintain a Quality Management System (QMS) in compliance with ISO 9001:2015.

readiness.notes: Multiple catalog product lines actively sold; ISO 9001:2015 certified QMS; global sales network and after-service functions.

tagline: Danish sonar specialist producing multibeam, forward-looking, and single-beam acoustic imaging systems for subsea platforms (ROVs, AUVs, USVs) and hydrographic survey. Part of Teledyne Marine's acoustic imaging group; ISO 9001 certified since 2004. NDAA compliance and Blue UAS certification status not publicly documented. Competitive positioning versus BlueView and Odom (sister companies) unclear from available sources.
